invalidation_conditions: A newer complete-day valuation record materially lowers the normalized pressure ratio.
A refreshed financial report changes profitability or growth quality.
Liquidity records become stale or conflicting.
must_not_do: Do not use this snapshot as external execution output.
Do not move this symbol into an approved target pool without human review and a later passing valuation gate.
Do not infer a price target from the normalized pressure ratio.
